name: Orange Butterflake Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve yeast in butter. Blend in eggs and oil. Add 5 cups Hot Roll Mix. Stir well. Add more Hot Roll Mix to make a soft dough.
2. Knead about 5 minutes, until dough is smooth. Lightly butter a bowl. Turn dough to coat the top. Cover dough with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
3. Grease muffin pans.
4. Prepare orange butter: Punch down dough. Let stand 10 minutes.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to a 10-inch x 20-inch rectangle. Brush with Orange Butter. Cut into 20 strips that are 1-inch square.
6. Stack the strips in groups of five. Cut each stack into six equal pieces. Place each cut stack upright in prepared muffin pans. Twist slightly to fan out. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 30 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake 12 to 15 minutes, until golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes before removing.
8. Prepare Orange Glaze by blending powdered sugar and orange juice until smooth. Drizzle over warm rolls.
